query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_monthly_close (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  close_year INT NOT NULL,
  close_month INT NOT NULL,
  total_purchases DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_sales DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  net_cash_flow DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  transaction_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  high_amount_transactions_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  pdf_report_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_year_month (close_year, close_month),
  INDEX idx_year_month (close_year, close_month),
  INDEX idx_is_locked (is_locked)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
